uncertainty_footnote: p5/p95 are sampling/stress-copula assumptions, not a full model of tail risk.

records.forecast_vol_note: Shared forecast sigma for main-grid expected return and Scenarios: 50/50 variance blend of model-implied sigma and robust 6M EWMA when both are available. Robust EWMA clipped at least one unusually large daily move.
